name: Fuse.js
when_to_use: 需要在内联中小型记录集上做容错拼写、加权多字段与相关度排序时用它而非手写 includes/filter,因为原生在模糊距离、字段权重和稳定排名上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能生成大小写归一后的 substring 过滤,做不到 Bitap 模糊匹配、字段长度归一、加权 key 与可解释命中区间;Fuse.js 直接产出带 score 的排名记录。

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of hand-written includes/filter when you need typo tolerance, weighted multi-field search, and relevance ranking over an inline small-to-medium record set, because native implementations fail at fuzzy distance, field weights, and stable ranking.
en.why_valuable: AI can normally only generate case-normalized substring filtering; it cannot provide Bitap fuzzy matching, field-length normalization, weighted keys, and explainable match ranges. Fuse.js directly returns ranked records with scores.

data_in.note: records is the array of objects to index, and keys points exactly to searchable field paths; each result item retains a reference to the original record, and scores closer to 0 are better matches.

schema.keys: (string | {name:string,weight:positive number})[] -- string keys have weight 1 by default
schema.limit?: positive integer -- returns all matches by default

data_in.note: records 是待索引对象数组,keys 精确指向可搜索字段路径;结果 item 保留原记录引用,score 越接近 0 越匹配。

schema.keys: (string | {name:string,weight:positive number})[] —— string key 的权重默认 1
schema.limit?: positive integer —— 默认返回全部命中

provides._note: headless-primitive:不直接渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵;纯 JS 索引与搜索层。

api_surface.search: fuse.search(query, limitConfig?) → 按相关度升序的结果数组
api_surface.score: boot 固定 includeScore:true,0 表示最佳匹配
api_surface.matches: includeMatches=true 时返回字符区间,供消费组件自行高亮

peer.note: Fuse 只产排名记录;长结果列表可把安全渲染后的行交给 Clusterize.js 虚拟滚动,本条不负责 DOM。

boot.note: 适合浏览器内中小数据集;记录数或长文本达到会阻塞主线程的规模时改用服务端检索或 worker 方案,不要把 Fuse 当数据库索引。

isolation.evidence: headless-primitive 纯 JS 搜索,无渲染;fuse.d.ts 仅暴露算法/数据结构类型(IFuseOptions/FuseResult/Searcher),无任何 document/window/DOM API,可在任意上下文(含 shadow)内运行。
